title: chrysosplenium dubium
intro: Chrysosplenium dubium, also known as golden spleenwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese and traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium dubium include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of various digestive disorders, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Chrysosplenium dubium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety as a treatment for various conditions have not been extensively scientifically studied.
